title: Smoked Dutch Bake
description: A savory Dutch-inspired casserole with a smoky twist, perfect for a dinner meal.
instructions: Cook the Smoked Bacon in a pan until crispy. Set aside.
In the same pan, cook the Caramelized Onions until dark brown.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the Dutch Gouda Cheese, Cracker Crumbs, and chopped Fresh Parsley.
Add the cooked Smoked Bacon, Caramelized Onions, and a pinch of Salt and Pepper to the bowl.
Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
Drizzle the Olive Oil over the top.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
